I have professional experience in Cloud, Platform, and Site Reliability Engineering (SRE) roles, specializing in Kubernetes, Docker, CI/CD pipelines, cloud and cloud security across AWS, GCP, and Azure. I am dedicated to helping clients optimize their operations in the cloud through containerization and orchestration technologies. I am a lifelong learner passionate about staying at the forefront of industry advancements and actively contribute to the tech community by providing training at various events focused on cloud-native technologies. person.name: Zeljko Zindovic
person.bio: I'm a tech geek who loves learning new tech, especially when it comes to cloud. I'm looking forward to contributing in that space someday.

person.name: Aashish Chaurasiya
person.bio: I’m a Developer Advocate at Vultr with a strong passion for Kubernetes and cloud-native technologies. I enjoy working within the CNCF ecosystem and helping teams build scalable, production-ready infrastructure. I’m always eager to learn and apply DevOps best practices, collaborate closely with engineers, and tackle real-world challenges. I care deeply about sharing practical knowledge, improving developer experience, and giving back to the cloud-native community.

person.name: Borlean Ovidiu Dumitru
person.bio: Networking engineer with a passion for anything related to containers and Kubernetes. Currently working in a DevOps position, with a special interest for IaC and automation in Azure and AWS.

person.name: George Ollis
person.bio: Cloud Architect, passionate about Azure and CNCF technologies. Extensive Kubernetes experience. Blog: www.georgeollis.com

person.name: Joseph Ligier
person.bio: I began my IT career as a Linux SysAdmin specializing in deployment. In 2015, everything changed when I discovered Docker, igniting my passion for containerization. I learned Kubernetes and passed the CKA certification in 2020. Currently, I’m an enthusiast of Cilium CNI, have collaborated on the Cilium certification (CCA) and i created an OpenTofu provider for deploying Cilium in Kubernetes. I'm also a Kubestronaut. My blog: https://medium.com/@littel.jo My credly: https://www.credly.com/users/joseph-ligier

person.name: Lionel Daubichon
person.bio: I’m a Senior Solution Architect with a strong track record of designing, building, and delivering platforms—both in the cloud and on-premises. I work with a Platform as a Product mindset, closely aligned with labspractices.com principles.  My focus is on building platforms that empower developers to ship secure, scalable, and high-quality applications faster—while also ensuring they remain operationally simple and maintainable for SREs.  I'm passionate about continuous learning and I make it a point to attend major conferences like KubeCon and AWS re:Invent to share and connect with peers.

person.name: Nuno Alves
person.bio: Computer Science and Engineering student at Instituto Superior Técnico with focus on Cybersecurity and Distributed Systems. Currently working on my Master's Thesis on Heterogeneous Memory Systems. Team Leader of the Development Team at SINFO (https://sinfo.org). Ex-SysAdmin and Coordinator at RNL (https://rnl.tecnico.ulisboa.pt). CTF Player at STT (https://sectt.github.io).

person.name: Yoshiaki Sakota
person.bio: I work as an SRE at TOKYO GAS Co., Ltd. Over the past several years, I've been involved in system development using a variety of CNCF technologies, particularly focusing on Kubernetes and Argo CD. I'm passionate about leveraging these technologies to deliver agile and valuable services to our customers.

person.name: Adhila Eramangalath Aydrose
person.bio: I am a cloud-native professional specializing in the Kubernetes ecosystem, with a deep focus on building secure, scalable infrastructure. My technical foundation is rooted in hands-on experience with CI/CD, Helm, and Infrastructure as Code (IaC), and I hold a Certified Kubernetes Security Specialist (CKS) designation. Beyond the command line, I am an active contributor to the tech community, where I share insights on Docker and Python through my technical blog and by organizing local Meetups. I am passionate about mentoring others and helping organizations navigate the complexities of modern cloud architecture.
